commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=f0591e31bbf1612d68f6a7a37c775ba061598a08)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds replay-identity hashing to transcript rewrite suffix replay and tests for collapsing duplicate messages while preserving distinct compaction boundaries.

PR surface: Source +80, Tests +76. Total +156 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source/unit level: the linked issue has persisted JSONL/log evidence, and current main replays the rewrite suffix from the first matched entry. I did not establish a live gateway overflow reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the external PR needs real behavior proof and the dedupe semantics require a code fix before merge.

target.title: fix(agents): dedupe transcript rewrite suffix replay
target.body:
## Summary
- Context-overflow recovery re-ran transcript suffix replay without a replay-identity guard, so byte-identical `role=user` entries were re-appended on every recovery pass and the persisted session JSONL accumulated duplicate messages, amplifying transcript growth and cascading into further overflows.
- Adds a per-pass replay-identity guard that collapses clones to the surviving entry id in both `rewriteTranscriptEntriesInSessionManager` and `rewriteTranscriptEntriesInState`.

## Root Cause
`src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/transcript-rewrite.ts` branches from the first rewritten entry's parent and re-appends the suffix `[matchedIndices[0]..end]` with no dedupe. When overflow recovery runs repeatedly, identical suffix entries are appended again on each pass. This matches the issue capture: one unique user message, three byte-identical copies (same content hash + length).

## Fix
- `computeBranchEntryReplayIdentity()` derives a stable identity (sha256 of the message/compaction/custom payload). During suffix replay, an entry whose identity was already emitted in this pass is skipped and its id is remapped to the surviving entry.
- Compaction identity folds in the **remapped `firstKeptEntryId`** (alongside `tokensBefore`/`summary`/`details`/`fromHook`) so two legitimately distinct compactions are not collapsed: `buildSessionContext()` uses the kept boundary to decide which pre-compaction messages survive, so merging them would silently drop the newer boundary.
- Only content-bearing entry types (message/compaction/custom/custom_message) dedupe; structural entries (model/thinking/label/branch_summary/session_info) always replay.

## Test Plan
- [x] Regression tests added in `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/transcript-rewrite.test.ts`:
  - `dedupes byte-identical replayed messages so suffix replay does not clone user entries` — fails on `main` (`expected 2 to be 1`), passes with the fix.
  - `keeps distinct compactions with identical summaries but different kept boundaries` — guards against over-merging compactions.
- [x] `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/transcript-rewrite.test.ts` -> 8 passed.
- [x] Sibling rewrite callers (`tool-result-truncation`, `context-engine-maintenance`, `compact.hooks`, `cli-runner.context-engine`) -> 119 passed.
- [x] `tsgo -p tsconfig.core.json` and core test types: no errors in the changed files. (Two unrelated pre-existing errors in `src/config/io.ts` and `src/secrets/config-io.ts` are present on `main` and untouched here.)

Deterministic before/after (in lieu of a live overflow):

```
before (main): expected 2 to be 1   // clone re-appended
after  (fix):  Tests  8 passed (8)  // clone collapsed
```

Verified at the unit level against the real `SessionManager` and transcript-file-state rewrite functions; I did not run a live gateway context-overflow, and the `crabbox check:changed` gate from the issue review was not run in this environment.

Closes #66443
target.author: dripsmvcp
